item.name: Wind-up Fran
item.description:
Stilettos guaranteed not to impede progress through markedly rough terrain such as jungles, bogs, and abandoned monasteries serving as prisons for extra-dimensional forces of evil.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Fran minion.
item.tooltip:
Fran is not too bad,
once you're on her
good side.
   - Rinok
item.specialactiondescription: Reduces HP of enemy Shield by 70%. No effect if Shield is already inoperable.
